brand.name: Meridian Tourism DMC
brand.tagline: You can always rely on us

hero.title: Discover the heart of the Silk Road
hero.subtitle: World-class VIP service, flawless logistics and exclusive journeys across the most ancient lands of Central Asia.

destinations.title: Popular Destinations
destinations.subtitle: Millennia of history, living landscapes and the legends of the Karakum

nisa.name: Ancient Nisa
nisa.desc: Residence of the Parthian kings — the cradle of a great empire at the foot of the Kopetdag.

merv.name: Ancient Merv
merv.desc: One of the greatest oases of the Silk Road, thriving for millennia.

konyeUrgench.name: Kunya-Urgench
konyeUrgench.desc: Capital of Khorezm with majestic mausoleums and the ancient Kutlug-Timur minaret.

darvaza.name: Darvaza Crater
darvaza.desc: The “Glory of the Karakum” — a burning gas crater glowing in the heart of the desert.

yangikala.name: Yangikala Canyons
yangikala.desc: Dazzling white and red cliffs — among the most picturesque landscapes in the country.

avaza.name: Avaza
avaza.desc: A modern tourist zone on the Caspian shore with golden beaches.

t1.quote: Flawless organization from the very first minute. VIP meet-and-greet, luxurious transport and a guide who brought the Silk Road to life.
t1.author: Henri Dubois

t2.quote: The Darvaza crater at sunset is unforgettable. Meridian planned every detail of our Karakum journey.
t2.author: Maria Schmidt

t3.quote: Professionalism of the highest class. The MICE logistics for our delegation were executed perfectly.
t3.author: James Carter

ctaBand.title: Shall we plan your journey?
ctaBand.subtitle: Tell us your wishes — we will prepare a tailored proposal within 24 hours.

aboutPage.heroSubtitle: We craft world-class experiences, blending the millennia-old history of the Silk Road with flawless service.
aboutPage.missionText: To reveal the authentic Turkmenistan to our guests — safely, comfortably and with the dignity of a great culture. We take on all the complexity of logistics so you can enjoy every moment of the journey.
aboutPage.philosophyText: Meridian is the meeting point of East and West, ancient and modern. As a meridian connects the poles, we connect people to the heart of Turkmenistan.
aboutPage.quote: “You can always rely on us” is not a slogan but a promise we keep in every detail.

toursPage.heroSubtitle: From ancient cities to the burning sands of the Karakum — Meridian's signature routes.
toursPage.mapHint: Hover a route to trace it on the map

nisa.highlights: Parthian fortress ruins, museum, tower temples.

merv.highlights: Mausoleum of Sanjar, Erk-Kala, Gyaur-Kala — heart of the oasis.

konyeUrgench.highlights: Kutlug-Timur minaret, mausoleums of Tyurabek-Khanym and Il-Arslan.

darvaza.highlights: Burning crater at sunset, yurt stay, desert sunrise.

yangikala.highlights: Multicolored canyons, salt lake, camping under the stars.

avaza.highlights: Caspian golden beaches, thalassotherapy, sea trips.

contact.address: Turkmenistan, Ashgabat, Turkmenbashi Avenue, 81 (Union of Industrialists and Entrepreneurs of Turkmenistan Building), 5th floor, office No. 5
